title: satureja graeca subsp. micrantha
intro: Satureja graeca subsp. micrantha, also known as Greek savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja graeca subsp. micrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. Satureja graeca subsp. micrantha can be consumed as a herbal tea, added to food for its flavor, or used as an essential oil in aromatherapy.
